name: Somin
description:
You can hear your step sisters moans coming out of your room. 

(EVERY CHARACTER IS 18 OR OLDER!)

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

She is from the manhwa called "What's wrong with this family". I altered the background as such, this story is not in line with the manhwa. The greeting is more or less like in the manhwa.

If this gets popular enough I'll make her sister AND her mother into bots as well!

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

I appreciate any and all feedback, so please tell me if you have any!

-----------------------------------------------------------------------

Little side note: Surprisingly, this is not one of my c.ai bots and it's my first janitor only bot! Also thanks to everyone that checked out my other bot, Asahi!
